name: Sean Astin
subject: worn out shoes, a suit, and a canary pin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I love the meaning behind Sherrod Brown's canary pin. A steelworker in Lorain, Ohio gave him the pin at a Memorial Day rally to symbolize the progress we've made in workers' rights and safety since the days where workers lacked basic protections and brought canaries into mines. But it also symbolizes the work that remains to be done...and for me, this is personal. My mom, Patty Duke, was the president of a labor union, The Screen Actors Guild. My family cares deeply about the health and safety of workers everywhere, a tradition I'm pleased to carry on and work toward. My mother worked tirelessly to advocate on behalf of working families and she was a foot soldier in an army of people who were determined to reshape the way mental illness is understood in America. **She 's not here to lead those fights anymore. But I am thankful that Sherrod is.** [**_Sherrod 's up for re-election this year and has a critical FEC deadline approaching. If we want to keep him in the Senate, we all need to step up and give $5, $10, or match his average online contribution of $26. _**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff939/4462dc26/51439dc6/2007c8e4/653003056/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE1YSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ struggling to afford their medications. Millions of families are worried about whether or not they have enough saved up for retirement and whether their pensions will be there for them. These are the conversations happening around dining room tables and living rooms across Ohio and across the country. **Sherrod knows that. And when he takes to the Senate floor, he wears a canary pin as a reminder to the country that our Congress has one purpose:_to serve our families._** I want to make sure that the Senator from the Buckeye State with a canary pin on his lapel is here to stay. [**_Match Sherrod 's average online contribution of $26 or give whatever you can so we can make that happen. _**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff939/4462dc26/51439dc6/2007c8e4/653003056/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE1YSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180615a?refcode=sbe180615a_m_other&refcode2=3268183") | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff939/4462dc26/51439dc6/2007c8e4/653003056/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE1YSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180615a?refcode=sbe180615a_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Tornillo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Friends,
When our country takes kids away from their mothers and fathers as punishment for coming to this country to seek asylum, when we call those kids "unaccompanied alien children" after we've forcibly "unaccompanied" them and sent them to shelters without any clear idea of when, or if, they'll see their moms and dads again...we'd like to say this isn't us, this isn't what we do, this isn't America.
Today, we did something about it. We took action.
With less than 24 hours notice, thousands of our fellow Americans made the trip to Tornillo -- where a makeshift shelter of tents has been constructed to hold those children -- to bear witness, to testify to our fellow Americans, and to force us to act.
_Photo credit: KTSM_
Under a bright sky and a sun that burned our faces and the backs of our necks, we remembered that we were there for the families who'd traveled under these same skies -- for thousands of miles -- and endured under this same sun, arriving to this country burned, dehydrated and desperate. Like millions of families over the course of our history, they finally arrived, in the hope that they had found refuge, shelter and asylum when their own country could no longer protect them from hunger, brutality and death.
They came only to discover that under a new zero-tolerance policy, that those parents who had risked everything to bring their children here -- as any parent, any human would do -- as Amy and I would do in the same situation -- would have their children taken from them.
So we marched to the Tornillo tent city that was constructed last week to house the children of those parents and the children who had arrived without parents. There are over 200 children in there right now. Up to 4,000 coming over the days and weeks ahead.
My 7-year-old son Henry called me to wish me a happy father's day this morning before we left for the march. I told him I loved him and I'd see him soon but today we were marching to be there for those kids being detained in Tornillo. He asked me if Tornillo was a jail or if it was a camp. And I told him it's kind of like both at the same time.
And then he asked me,
"Why, dad? Did they do something wrong?"
There's no more important time to be alive than this one. To be an American, to be on the U.S.-Mexico border, to have the opportunity to define who we are as a country.
What's happening right now, it's on us, all of us -- no person, no party, no administration however powerful. It's on all of us, the people of America.
And after today I know that America is ready to meet this challenge, this test -- a moment that will define us for the rest of our lives and for the history to be written long after we're gone.
Whether it was Angela who came in from Rockport, a city still recovering from Hurricane Harvey. Or the delegations from Midland, Lubbock, Dallas, Austin and Houston. Joe, who took two flights from Boston. All the kids from El Paso, the teachers from Fort Hancock, the families from New Mexico. A woman who learned about this 20 hours ago in Salt Lake City, and jumped in the car stopping only for gas and a McDonald's.
People from all walks of life. Musicians (thank you David Garza and Jim Ward!), teachers, veterans, retirees, activists and shut-ins. People who've never been involved in politics, people who hold public office, people who want to hold public office. And people who want to hold those in public office accountable.
Veronica Escobar, our former County Judge and future Congresswoman who initiated the call to action and brought us together. Lupe Valdez who for the day suspended her campaign for governor and flew to El Paso, got a few hours of sleep and then drove to Tornillo to help lead the march. Fernado Garcia. Ruben Garcia. Cristobal Joshua Alex. Melissa Lopez. Congressman Joe Kennedy.
Today we were able to bear witness, to ensure that this is on us, on our conscience. And that we bear that burden now because we know it will be unbearable for long -- that it will force us to act, to push, to pressure, to ensure that our laws reflect our kids, those kids, and that idea and ideal of America that we still hold true.
No good tough important thing has ever happened in this country because Congress, Presidents, people in positions of power, woke up and decided to do the right thing. It's only ever happened when the people of this country forced those who had the power to use it for our common good.
I saw that today, and I am grateful that I got to be part of it.
Beto

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921f0/3b1d797/78362b33/35a9b918/4040117258/VEsH/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921f0/3b1d797/78362b33/35a9b919/4040117258/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Katie O'Halleran
subject: we're proud of our dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
t's Fathers' Day, and my brothers and I are asking for your help to make it a special one for our dad, Congressman Tom O'Halleran.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63395d/1a8421e1/1a4529293/4b902298/3611634884/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
Friends, we have a lot of reasons to be proud of our dad. As young kids, we looked up to him as a decorated police officer who risked his life to serve and protect. We reveled in hearing him describe his childhood. His dad was a janitor who grew up on a dairy farm, and his mom raised him and his siblings. Our dad's childhood and work as a police officer instilled in him a deep respect for hardworking people facing challenges. Our dad's dedication to helping others is what drove him to run for Congress. We are so proud of him for it. Every day, he stands up for Arizona families. He believes in making our government serve people and he works hard to make that happen--from his days in the Arizona state legislature (where he fought to have proper funding for education and child protective services) to his first term in Congress (where he has championed legislation to help veterans, people impacted by uranium mining pollution, treatment for babies impacted by opioid abuse, and so many others). He is focused on improving ethics in Washington, while serving and protecting everyone, particularly seniors, children, and veterans. We love our dad, who is a sincere person and a caring father and grandfather. Our dad taught me you can accomplish anything if you put your mind to it. He also taught us to treat people fairly, work hard towards your goals, and don't be intimidated. As a small example from my high school basketball days, I smile when I recall asking my dad for advice when I had a tough person to guard on a high-ranking team. My dad reminded me of my strengths and said to not be intimidated. He then said, "Go get 'em!" I played fairly and with heart, and my opponent was frustrated by the end of the game (oh, and we won). Our dad is running in a tight race for re-election. It would be wonderful if you could help out with his fundraising so he can continue to fight hard for hardworking Arizonans and people throughout the country. [**Can you make a donation to his campaign today?**](http://action.tomohalleran. name: Jeremy Ring
subject: The first choice of state workers for CFO
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Csug7DtZuwPpcUvota74-Nm9ZFzuzKsev-gsg_eh1HY=/PHwhqK9nPUHb0lUKpbiev1VmMbsnLB3yS3KoKSVQItE=) Friends and Neighbors -- One of the Chief Financial Officer's most consequential roles is as a trustee to Florida's $160 billion retirement system. And one thing has become abundantly clear-- **state workers don 't trust the current CFO to manage their money, they trust me. ** Over the past 18 months, this campaign has taken our message from the Panhandle to the Everglades and we've been overwhelmed by the outpouring of support we've received. This -- _rings_ \-- especially true from those who count on the CFO and the other Trustees to ensure that their retirement savings are secure. **Which is why I am extremely humbled and honored to have the backing of the International Association of Fire Fighters (IAFF), the Police Benevolent Association (PBA), the Florida Education Association (FEA), the AFL-CIO and AFSCME Florida**. These groups represent our brave and hard working fire fighters, police officers, first responders, educators and other state workers. With these endorsements, it is clear - **we are Florida 's state workers' first choice for CFO.** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Csug7DtZuwPpcUvota74-Nm9ZFzuzKsev-gsg_eh1HY=/RmEQE0vH38FDJq2qYm5I_6mJSOZ1ZIIkjiI1GF_7HIo=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) [Stand with JR and state workers. Chip in $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Csug7DtZuwPpcUvota74-Nm9ZFzuzKsev-gsg_eh1HY=/RmEQE0vH38FDJq2qYm5I_6mJSOZ1ZIIkjiI1GF_7HIo=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) As your next CFO, I will put a stop to that, by protecting the retirement of these workers, giving them peace of mind in knowing that their well-earned investment is safe and secure. But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help.** [**Can you contribute $20.18 or more today to help me help our great state workers by protecting their retirement and promoting other policies that put them first?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Csug7DtZuwPpcUvota74-Nm9ZFzuzKsev-gsg_eh1HY=/RmEQE0vH38FDJq2qYm5I_6mJSOZ1ZIIkjiI1GF_7HIo=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

Coral Springs FL 33067 United States

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Not looking good…
body:
---
| | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, I have a personal favor to ask of you. This election year will be a defining moment for our country. There is more at stake than whether Republicans keep the majority in Congress. I do not say this lightly, but our core values as a country are on the line. Democrats know this. Which is why Chuck Schumer is spending tens of millions of dollars to oust me from the Senate. Millions of dollars are pouring into Texas to influence this election. Democrats think this is their opportunity to turn Texas blue and install their radical left-wing agenda. **Their money is having an effect and the latest polling shows my opponent is within single digits!** The rule of law, freedom of speech, religious liberty, and the Second Amendment are all being undermined by a leftist agenda that wants to transform our core values as a nation. I have fought for conservative, American values my entire life. We can’t back down now and let them buy this election from us. **[Fellow Conservative, I am asking for your help. As a personal favor, can you donate $5, $25, $100, or anything you can generously contribute?](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTY5LTgxZTYyOGY5Nzc0ZjQzNjJiOTZmMjU1MDY2OWVlNGFj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vY3J1ejIwMTgvUEdFbWFpbDEyLw&K=JepPbvMtCtleTEbyRZO06g)** I do not have the support of the Hollywood elite. My opponent has support from coastal liberals such as Elizabeth Warren, Sarah Jessica Parker, and of course, Rosie O'Donnell. I am reaching out to you as a Republican and a conservative for your support. **[Please click here and send an urgent donation to my campaign today](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTY5LTgxZTYyOGY5Nzc0ZjQzNjJiOTZmMjU1MDY2OWVlNGFj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vY3J1ejIwMTgvUEdFbWFpbDEyLw&K=ZTqypvZVLnGBWkfLrRq9EA)**. I will always fight for our shared conservative values. And with your support, I will continue to that fight in the United States Senate. Thank you, Senator Ted Cruz
---
| | | | | [Send Urgent Donation >>](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTY5LTgxZTYyOGY5Nzc0ZjQzNjJiOTZmMjU1MDY2OWVlNGFj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vY3J1ejIwMTgvUEdFbWFpbDEyLw&K=_xOXHDYLzWl7PzzhFx-qew)
---
107 S. West Street Suite 826 Alexandria VA, 20178

name: DNC HQ
subject: This can't wait until our fundraising deadline, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
The DNC's monthly fundraising goals are not created on a whim -- they are deliberate benchmarks that our party needs to hit in order to build a winning strategy for 2018, 2020, and beyond.
---
I've been crunching the numbers, Derek. We're more than halfway through June, but only 42% of the way to our monthly fundraising goal -- and we don't want to come up short.

[](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522cfd/4067b0a/64e0a64f4/7fba9d0e/438010918/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-midmonth?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em_20180618_js_nd_a&source=em_20180618_js_nd_a&refcode=em_20180618_js_nd_a") The DNC's monthly fundraising goals are not created on a whim -- they are deliberate benchmarks that our party needs to hit in order to meet our commitment to state parties and candidates, support organizing efforts across the country, and invest in the latest tools and technology to mobilize voters.

**According to my records, you haven't donated yet this year. It would mean so much if you could make your first contribution of 2018 to help Democrats stay on track this month.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522cfd/4067b0a/64e0a64f4/7fba9d0f/438010918/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-midmonth?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180618_js_nd_a&source=em_20180618_js_nd_a&refcode=em_20180618_js_nd_a")

[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522cfd/4067b0a/64e0a64f4/7fba9d0a/438010918/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-midmonth?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180618_js_nd_a&source=em_20180618_js_nd_a&refcode=em_20180618_js_nd_a")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522cfd/4067b0a/64e0a64f4/7fba9d0b/438010918/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-midmonth?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180618_js_nd_a&source=em_20180618_js_nd_a&refcode=em_20180618_js_nd_a")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522cfd/4067b0a/64e0a64f4/7fba9d08/438010918/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-midmonth?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180618_js_nd_a&source=em_20180618_js_nd_a&refcode=em_20180618_js_nd_a")
** In order to reach our June goal and make sure that Democrats have the resources they need to compete and win, we are counting on our most committed supporters to step up today.

**[So how about it, Derek? Will you make your first $3 contribution of 2018 to elect Democrats nationwide?](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522cfd/4067b0a/64e0a64f4/7fba9d09/438010918/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-midmonth?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+So+how+about+itCUSTOMDATASETslugwhitelis&utm_campaign=em_20180618_js_nd_a&source=em_20180618_js_nd_a&refcode=em_20180618_js_nd_a")**

Reaching this goal will only happen if we work together. Thank you for adding your contribution today.

Joe

Joe Smolskis
Chief Financial Officer
Democratic National Committee

If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522cfd/4067b0a/64e0a64f4/7fba9d15/438010918/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180618_js_nd_a&source=em_20180618_js_nd_a"). Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
clean_body: The DNC's monthly fundraising goals are not created on a whim -- they are deliberate benchmarks that our party needs to hit in order to build a winning strategy for 2018, 2020, and beyond. I've been crunching the numbers, Derek. We're more than halfway through June, but only 42% of the way to our monthly fundraising goal -- and we don't want to come up short. "" The DNC's monthly fundraising goals are not created on a whim -- they are deliberate benchmarks that our party needs to hit in order to meet our commitment to state parties and candidates, support organizing efforts across the country, and invest in the latest tools and technology to mobilize voters. According to my records, you haven't donated yet this year. It would mean so much if you could make your first contribution of 2018 to help Democrats stay on track this month. "" "" "" "" "" "" In order to reach our June goal and make sure that Democrats have the resources they need to compete and win, we are counting on our most committed supporters to step up today. "" Reaching this goal will only happen if we work together. Thank you for adding your contribution today. Joe Joe Smolskis Chief Financial Officer Democratic National Committee

name: The White House
subject: America’s crisis at the border
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8dbf725b40c44f4962fbb4cc1cd268d189ed1e949eb035b216ddde8e640fd4d34bb019af1c6ea6c83ccfa483cfa94ffdd2437c46bd085579) The White House • June 18, 2018
## The Day Ahead
Members of Congress and Vice President Mike Pence will join President Donald J. Trump as he meets with the National Space Council to discuss the Administration's latest space policy initiative. [Watch live at 12:00 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8dbf725b40c44f49f3d61d8a4859d5b6b208d7fbff5ad9615ea0dc7aed1e9281bbb68746c24d48a96203c1fd3a3710c668b01f6736b93f8b) |
---
|

## America's crisis at the border
**The harshest family separation policy** is that too many Americans have been permanently separated from loved ones because of crime spilling across our border. Juan Pina lost his daughter after she was brutally assaulted and killed by an illegal alien. Jamiel Shaw, Sr. was permanently separated from his son, murdered by a gang member who was in the United States illegally.
**Illegal immigration along our Southwest border surged 230 percent** in April compared to last year, according to the Department of Homeland Security. This statistic reveals the lack of an orderly and fair process to manage the [escalating flow of illegal immigrants](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8dbf725b40c44f4968a0c775993221db1d4745390bbd9441b5038035c4a8f1571df2cc57fa55a8f2659adc77cf2fe26a25254a932d3c6029). That flawed system creates both a humanitarian and a national security crisis at our border.
**The crime and illegal drugs flooding our country** because of open border policies and enforcement loopholes must stop. Yet Congressional Democrats have repeatedly voted against common sense immigration legislation, such as Kate's Law, that would make our communities safer. In 2017, 174 House Democrats voted against legislation that would have helped ensure aliens associated with a gang are not admitted into the United States.
[Watch President Trump's weekly address on the gruesome threat of MS-13.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8dbf725b40c44f4957716178c7284e58c5a4b3dbf9cb5c94a0008cbc24880de6a0535adedfe84e04de34b2d57b5504fea863789ad4a71e26)
**More** : [Inside Congressional Democrats' dangerous immigration policies ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8dbf725b40c44f491a70356ba4850d4065207fb5d5ca663e3e4212eced3e0fb594f81f93e1a6e4615cdf611fb8f4e792f12051e28376bfc1)
---
|

## President Trump's Father's Day message
**On Friday, President Trump issued a Proclamation** to officially honor yesterday, June 17, as Father's Day.
**"On Father's Day, we pay special tribute** to the men who devote themselves to supporting and caring for their loved ones," the President writes. "Fathers across our country serve as role models for their children and families. Through their examples, they display the fundamental American values of hard work and dedication."
[Read President Trump's full 2018 Father's Day Proclamation. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8dbf725b40c44f4999e7cc762dd14e5f11dbbbf85dcf68de05c265b2efe5b19e860ebeb5bebf17ea9c29d51969a5100e8778eb33549a8319)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
**Evelyn Rodriguez's daughter was chased down and brutally murdered by MS-13 in September 2016.**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8dbf725b40c44f494756237832a31d50852fe2cdbfd0c3b911928ecf8fb6725550077805dba10f4ab8469802323cd26ace235f56b8c1db43) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8dbf725b40c44f495d3e05daeaa57f9c19d39d4ad882aa8d7be7e3ec5617240ccb8a97c8bf9f5f89ad6652266505881381cf872745908325) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d43bba4b30465265fc4118907c38f3b2ce36833e4e80b53c471a3b681e76d62982bfecec049f3dea01007f5bef3ab7bc2c28e95f77e74d25e0)

name: Martha Roby for Congress
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Martha Roby for Congress
body:
| | | | [View in browser](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=105A127A9A3719)

---
| | [](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=105A127A9A3720)
---
| | Friends,

I wanted to make sure you saw Susan B. Anthony List President Marjorie Dannenfelser's [piece in Yellowhammer News](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=105A127A9A3721).

**"This year’s elections present the greatest opportunity the pro-life movement has had in many years, and there is so much work to be done," said Marjorie Dannenfelser. "When it comes to policies that have a very real, lifesaving impact in Alabama and across the country, voters should know they can count on Martha Roby to fight for them. SBA List wholeheartedly supports her and urges pro-life Alabamians to send her to Washington once again."**

I am grateful to have the strong support of SBA List in my campaign for reelection in AL-02, and I appreciate this outstanding organization's commitment to the pro-life cause.

In Congress, I have made it a top priority to speak out loudly in defense of the unborn who cannot yet speak for themselves. I will always fight for greater protections for life at every stage, and I humbly ask for your support on July 17th so that I can continue to this important work.
\- Martha

subject: are you all in?

body:
| | |

**_BREAKING POLLING UPDATE:_**
**Democrat Jacky Rosen DOWN BY ONE in race to decide Senate control:** **[Give $5 right now to become a Senate Victory Member and help us win in Nevada so Democrats can take back the Senate>>>](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd745/4fbb2af3/7fbb5da5/5e8ba6e7/808766372/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc3NC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk774-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
|

**Two MAJOR updates, team, and they're _not good:_**

* _The Washington Post_ reported that Democrats likely **CANNOT** take back the Senate if we lose this race in Nevada.

* A recent poll in Nevada shows Democrat Jacky Rosen _TRAILING_ Donald Trump's rubber stamp, Dean Heller, by one point.

**Nothing less than the future of Obamacare and the Supreme Court is on the line in Nevada this fall. **

That's why Super PACs linked to Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and the Koch brothers are doing whatever it takes - including pledging _MILLIONS_ - to keep their Senate majority.

Now more than ever, we need to know if you're all in. **Already, 568**** Democrats have chipped in to become Senate Victory Members and help take back the Senate this fall, but we don't see your name on the list, and we're running out of time to close this gap.**

**[Team, we WILL lose our best shot to take back the Senate if we fall short in Nevada. Please, give $5 or more now- whatever you can before our midnight deadline - to become a Senate Victory Member and take back the Senate for Democrats:](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd745/4fbb2af3/7fbb5da5/5e8ba6e7/808766372/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc3NC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk774-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: John Kasich
subject: It's just wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
America needs a secure border but separating children from their parents is just wrong. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2668a9ac8d584886b83d703c2a123005&_e=lWDdtTMKSkmUozsciQcJtGR9IGatxhFT_43VbgqDE9sP3EHCgMnhEIs3zbAOXUZKW1x68cYEY0n2cvFKRK1wlr7o0fyVsFMk7ICSkmdpNHa5qtCsWTGAWqOuESmndhQp7T_rQTzDRtLMTc01yVJ0WZHCCE_IWx_AklYifT-L7zB8asoW25zcrE7BHzddsOg3tKsYBLiVZ0PCpnq1ixDfdC-d-iiltgOa8jvqeIBu1Y8QIYiBdHTvGXq-jmxqNEajKnGdyXSCmiN-CdVcybPvXA%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter, have you seen the news about the Trump administration's policy that is separating children from their parents at our borders?

**America needs a secure border but separating children from their parents is just wrong.**

**Is this the image of America we want the world to see?**

We need to forcefully take a stand against this policy and make our voices heard NOW.

\- _The Hill_ , 6/15/18 Peter -- We are launching an emergency response campaign for Sherrod and we need your help. On Friday, Vice President Pence wasted no time attacking Sherrod right here in Ohio. This is what we're up against. We're up against outright lies and ridiculous smears. We're up against an Administration that is happy to scam the American people to protect billionaires. [**_Sherrod needs your support now. Will you donate $26, our campaign 's average contribution, to our emergency response fund by midnight tonight?_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff93e/4462dc26/514f4e4f/2007c8b3/2913630117/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618z?refcode=sbe1806018z_m&amount=26") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff93e/4462dc26/514f4e4f/2007c8b2/2913630117/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE4eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618z?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180618z_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff93e/4462dc26/514f4e4f/2007c8b2/2913630117/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE4eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618z?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180618z_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff93e/4462dc26/514f4e4f/2007c8b2/2913630117/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE4eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618z?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180618z_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff93e/4462dc26/514f4e4f/2007c8b1/2913630117/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE4eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618z?refcode=sbe180618z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** The truth is there is no greater champion for Ohio families than Sherrod. name: U.S. Senator Jon Tester
subject: I need your help, Derek:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
I've been defending Montana in the Senate, and Mitch McConnell would like nothing more than to flip this seat.
---
Derek --

There are five Democratic senators up for re-election in "deep red" states and I'm one of them.

I've been defending Montana in the Senate, and I've fought to protect our public lands, hold Washington accountable, and ensure that more veterans get the care they've earned. But Mitch McConnell has singled out Montana as one of the GOP's top targets this year. If we want to ensure that we have some balance in Washington, we need to hold on to my seat.

**Unfortunately, it takes resources to win elections these days, so I'm asking you: Will you make a $10 contribution to my campaign and to Democrats nationwide to send me back to the Senate and elect Democrats up and down the ballot?**

**[ DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67de/431337294/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67df/431337294/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67dc/431337294/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67dd/431337294/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd")
[DONATE: $200](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67da/431337294/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67db/431337294/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-jon-tester?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd")
** I come from a family of farmers, and I got my start in public service as a local school board member in Big Sandy. I've seen firsthand how change is possible when people come together in their communities around a common purpose rooted in our shared values.

It's those values that we must fight for.

What we've seen over the past year is a kick in the teeth to our democracy. Washington Republicans have waged countless attacks on our health care while giving tax breaks to the wealthiest people and corporations. We can put working folks first -- but only if Democrats take back the Senate in November.

**[Make a $10 donation to my campaign and Democrats nationwide today to help keep this Senate seat blue and elect Democrats across the country.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67d8/431337294/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-jon-tester?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-++if+consinConsGroup30561+You+stood+with+&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd")**

I am counting on you to help me win re-election and continue defending our values in the Senate. Thank you for adding a contribution today to help make that possible.

Jon Tester
U.S. Senator, Montana

P.S. Democrats can regain a majority in the Senate this fall -- but only if we defend my seat in Montana. **[Donate $10 to my campaign and Democrats nationwide today.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67d9/431337294/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-jon-tester?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-++if+consinConsGroup29422+Youve+already+d&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67e6/431337294/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67e7/431337294/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67e4/431337294/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67e5/431337294/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052130d/4067b0a/64df9a4bd/7fbd67e2/431337294/VEsHBg/ "http://www.Democrats.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+wwwDemocratsorg&utm_campaign=em_20180618_jt_nd&source=em_20180618_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180618_jt_nd"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: I am a breast cancer survivor
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | I am a breast cancer survivor. I am an American living with a pre-existing condition. **The Trump Administration just announced that it will not defend protections for me, or the 130 million Americans living with a pre-existing condition, from discrimination at the hands of insurance companies.** This is part of Republicans' ongoing mission to destroy the Affordable Care Act, bit by little bit. We can't let them get away with it. [**_Demand President Trump and his administration reverse this decision and defend Americans with pre-existing conditions._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f30/622b7b5b/1b487a2f/307b80fb/310851433/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180615") No cancer patient should worry they'll be denied the health coverage they need to afford treatment. The health of millions of Americans is on the line. I will not be silent. I am fighting back. And I hope you'll join me. The Affordable Care Act needs some fixes, to be sure. **But eliminating protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions is not one of them.** [**_Let the Trump Administration know where you stand >>_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f30/622b7b5b/1b487a2f/307b80fb/310851433/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180615") Thank you. Debbie
---

|

clean_body: | | | I am a breast cancer survivor. I am an American living with a pre-existing condition. The Trump Administration just announced that it will not defend protections for me, or the 130 million Americans living with a pre-existing condition, from discrimination at the hands of insurance companies. This is part of Republicans' ongoing mission to destroy the Affordable Care Act, bit by little bit. We can't let them get away with it. "" No cancer patient should worry they'll be denied the health coverage they need to afford treatment. The health of millions of Americans is on the line. I will not be silent. I am fighting back. And I hope you'll join me. The Affordable Care Act needs some fixes, to be sure. But eliminating protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions is not one of them. "" Thank you. Debbie | | | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress

name: Mark Warner
subject: Asking for Tim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
My friend and colleague, Tim Kaine, is up against Corey Stewart, a candidate with a history of outperforming polling and spreading hateful rhetoric. ---------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, it's officially general election season in Virginia.

My friend and colleague, Tim Kaine, is up against Corey Stewart, a candidate with a history of outperforming polling and spreading hateful rhetoric.

In fact, a poll before the primary showed Stewart was Tim's most challenging opponent, _with Tim only pulling 44% in a match up._ And Stewart said **Democrats won 't be stepping up to support Tim Kaine,** which is how he thinks he will win.

**Success in Virginia this year depends on making sure Tim is able to keep his seat despite these attacks - and do so in a way that helps Democrats win throughout the state.**

[I know what it's like to fight hard for a win - and the reality is, it comes down to every last dollar. Join me in chipping in $5 or $25 to make sure Tim can fight back against whatever Stewart throws his way in the general election.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1381/3e0906/6ba84485/3e3417f4/448604613/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180618_1_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+I+know+what+itrsquos+like+to+fight+hard+&utm_campaign=20180618_1_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate&source=20180618_1_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1381/3e0906/6ba84485/3e3417cb/448604613/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180618_1_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate_express_lane_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180618_1_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate&source=20180618_1_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate")

Tim and I have a common goal: Building a foundation here in Virginia that will give us the victories we need to do better by American families.

It's important to both of us that every year we run, we are training and empowering the future volunteers, campaign staffers, and candidates that will stay and continue to inspire progress in Virginia.

**So Derek, setting Tim up for success this year is going to give us the momentum, tools, and talent to win back the State House next year.**

And we all saw last month with Medicaid expansion how much these wins matter.

[Derek, I'm asking: Will you chip in to Tim's campaign to make an investment in him, the program he's building, and the future of Virginia?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1381/3e0906/6ba84485/3e3417cf/448604613/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180618_1_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+FIRSTNAMEFriend+Irsquom+asking+Will+you+&utm_campaign=20180618_1_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate&source=20180618_1_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate")

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: this is an embarrassment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
There's no other way to put this, Friends: EPA Administrator Scott Pruitt is an embarrassment.
Pruitt has spent his year in office trying to charter private planes and milk his position for every perk it's worth. He's flown from state to state, coast to coast to hold hush-toned meetings with Big Oil - all funded with taxpayers' dollars.
From day one, Pruitt has been a puppet for big polluters: He's rolled back Obama-era regulations that were put in place to protect the planet and Americans' health from pollution and toxic pesticides and undermined the mission of his own agency every day.
**He 's destroying our environment - so this corrupt climate change denier needs to go immediately. **[Please, Friends, add your name right now to stand with me in calling on Scott Pruitt to resign.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/cjs-pruitt?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk867-ja-nd&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fcjs-pruitt-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk867-ja-nd)****
We've had enough of his destructive agenda - so thank you for speaking out when it matters most.
Jeanne

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=6JbLl5Fv8e2f7oDYAUT5IOUNwC1zWuU5&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.

Pruitt has spent his year in office trying to charter private planes and milk his position for every perk it's worth. He's flown from state to state, coast to coast to hold hush-toned meetings with Big Oil - all funded with taxpayers' dollars. From day one, Pruitt has been a puppet for big polluters: He's rolled back Obama-era regulations that were put in place to protect the planet and Americans' health from pollution and toxic pesticides and undermined the mission of his own agency every day. He 's destroying our environment - so this corrupt climate change denier needs to go immediately. **** We've had enough of his destructive agenda - so thank you for speaking out when it matters most. Jeanne

name: Ashley Walukevich
subject: School Choice!
body:
Derek, **All students, regardless of their zip code and income level, deserve the opportunity for an education that fits their unique needs and goals.**

**On Wednesday, June 27th** at 6:00PM, please join us for a FREE event you won't want to miss on expanding School Choice in New Hampshire! Come meet with elected officials and community leaders to learn more about the benefits of educational opportunity.
This FREE event will include light dinner, opening remarks by New Hampshire's Education Commissioner, Frank Edelblut, and a panel discussion featuring Kate Baker (Children's Scholarship Fund), Drew Cline (Josiah Bartlett Center) and Jason Bedrick (former NH state legislator).

clean_body: Derek, All students, regardless of their zip code and income level, deserve the opportunity for an education that fits their unique needs and goals. On Wednesday, June 27th at 6:00PM, please join us for a FREE event you won't want to miss on expanding School Choice in New Hampshire! Come meet with elected officials and community leaders to learn more about the benefits of educational opportunity. This FREE event will include light dinner, opening remarks by New Hampshire's Education Commissioner, Frank Edelblut, and a panel discussion featuring Kate Baker (Children's Scholarship Fund), Drew Cline (Josiah Bartlett Center) and Jason Bedrick (former NH state legislator). Sincerely, Ashley Walukevich RNC State Director - NH | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Let's celebrate together
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3020/9e00690/46657330/24022e26/393586974/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180615_Storm1_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180615_Storm1_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Friends,

Growing up, my grandmother and parents taught me the importance of surrounding myself with a strong community and the importance of hard work.

This seems so simple, but without those values instilled in me, I wouldn't have ever become the first person in my immediate family to graduate from high school and college or the youngest person to be elected to the Tallahassee City Commission before becoming Mayor. And I definitely wouldn't be submitting my name on the ballot to be the next Governor of Florida.

But that's exactly what I'm doing today.

This is a momentous step for our campaign, and I wouldn't have gotten here without the support of grassroots supporters just like you -- so let's celebrate together.

**[My team is organizing a social media takeover to celebrate all we've done together. Click here to join us today, and then invite your friends and family to join us as well!](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3020/9e00690/46657330/24022e39/393586974/VEsE/ "https://andrewgillum.com/2018/06/qualifying-day-join-social-storm/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=2+-+My+team+is+organizing+a+social+media+tak&utm_campaign=em18_180615_Storm1_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180615_Storm1_fnd_gq_act__AG")**

I got into this race because it's about time working families -- just like the one I grew up in -- have a champion in the Governor's mansion. I'll make healthcare more affordable and accessible, including through Medicare for All, increase spending on education and workforce training through a corporate tax adjustment and marijuana legalization, and raise the minimum wage in Florida to $15 an hour.

But I need your continued support to do it -- and today, we'll be one step closer.

**[So please, help celebrate this step in our campaign by joining our social media takeover.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3020/9e00690/46657330/24022e38/393586974/VEsF/ "https://andrewgillum.com/2018/06/qualifying-day-join-social-storm/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3+-+So+please+help+celebrate+this+step+in+ou&utm_campaign=em18_180615_Storm1_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180615_Storm1_fnd_gq_act__AG")**

Bring it home,

Andrew

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3020/9e00690/46657330/24022e3b/393586974/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-june-2018?gpsid=13_55_1315&refcode=em18_180615_Storm1_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180615_Storm1_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

Tallahassee, FL 32303

subject: onward to November
body:

| | Friends, Since our last newsletter the primary election has come and gone. Voter turnout was extremely low throughout our congressional district. We are going to have to work harder to get people out to vote in the general. Voter turnout will make or break an election and we need to get every vote we can to achieve victory! BUT WE CAN DO IT!!! We do know now that we will be facing Congressman Palazzo in the general. We have to constantly remind people of his unwillingness to talk to his constituents. As a representative, you do not get the luxury of only being held accountable to your most loyal supporters, you are supposed to be accountable to your district as a whole. I am ready and prepared to be that kind of representative. I am ready for open dialogues with my constituents whether we all agree on policies or not. I am ready to work with all of the counties in the district to find ways our federal government can aid them with community based solutions to everyday issues that prevent our state from moving up the national ladder. This is our campaign promise. This is our movement and it does not have momentum without the help of you guys!! I am ready to work with all of the counties in the district to find ways our federal government can aid them with community based solutions to everyday issues that prevent our state from moving up the national ladder. This is our campaign promise. This is our movement and it does not have momentum without the help of you guys!! Things you can do to help: Show your support with a yard sign: a donation: Volunteer to canvass: Upcoming appearances and dates to remember:DON’T FORGET THE DEMOCRATIC PRIMARY RUNOFF ELECTION IS TUESDAY JUNE 26TH. SUNDAY JUNE 24THMEET AND GREET FOR REPRESENTATIVE ANDERSON at Lakeshore Community Center at 4 p.m. Lakeshore Community Center is located at 6440 Lower Bay Rd., Bay St. Louis, Mississippi. (see event flyer below) SATURDAY JUNE 30THGulf Coast LGBT + Pride Day - The festival is being held at Point Cadet Plaza in Biloxi, we will have a booth so stop by and say Hi! Hope to see you folks soon!Onward,Jeramey Anderson For Congress | | | |

name: Ben Jealous
subject: The foundation Bernie laid
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Progressive values are winning values.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66d/7ab0e2c4/7f9a7fc9/349ba187/142025753/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-bernie-rally?refcode=OHQ0618B") Friend, In a few hours, I'll be joined by Senator Bernie Sanders on stage in Silver Spring. It's a little surreal, because in 2016, I introduced him in a place that (I thought) was far from progressive -- deep in the heart of the Ozarks. Here I was, the former president of the NAACP, speaking in front of an overwhelmingly white audience about ending police shootings of unarmed black Americans. I didn't expect a rousing response -- but I got one. Which taught me that no matter where you are, or who you're speaking with, we all believe in the same things: equality, kindness, and progress for our families and our communities. **It's those same beliefs that led me to run for governor of Maryland, because I believe we can do more -- the most, even -- for our families and communities if we work for progress together. Bernie believes it, and so do I.** [**If you do too, invest in this campaign today by donating $5 or more right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66d/7ab0e2c4/7f9a7fc9/349ba187/142025753/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-bernie-rally?refcode=OHQ0618B") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66d/7ab0e2c4/7f9a7fc9/349ba186/142025753/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-bernie-rally?amount=5&refcode=OHQ0618B&express_lane=true")

---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66d/7ab0e2c4/7f9a7fc9/349ba18d/142025753/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-bernie-rally?refcode=OHQ0618B&express_lane=true")
---
Throughout his life, Bernie has been a fearless, tireless, and trustworthy champion for the right of all our nation's children to have full and unfettered access to the American dream. He's also known that, for much of our nation's history, change has happened incrementally, on a small scale.
It's time to dream big again. And when we have leaders in D.C. who can't get the job done, it's time to get it done here at home -- we have big plans for Maryland, and no plans to step back. This campaign is built on a foundation Bernie laid, from championing Medicare-For-All to equal public education and debt-free college.
**A blue wave is coming in 2018, and we can't let it leave Maryland behind. We need to protect and build on progressive values here at home.**
[**That's why, if you believe in the progress that Bernie and I believe in, I hope you'll invest in this campaign today with a donation of $5 or more. Let's show them progressive values are winning values.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66d/7ab0e2c4/7f9a7fc9/349ba187/142025753/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-bernie-rally?refcode=OHQ0618B")
Thanks,
Ben

subject: Have you seen my new ad?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
The left is unhinged. When Scott Walker and I took bold action to turn Wisconsin around, they came after us with everything they had. They even thre

Friend -

The left is unhinged.

When Scott Walker and I took bold action to turn Wisconsin around, they came after us with everything they had. They even threatened my life and the lives of my children.

But I’m standing up to them – I decided to tell the story **[in my new ad.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=zaQmRzx67RuMK4iNXdFOBzcBIBqjT-tOd1ZiReofXxp1_DAcf6TnzBin1L-6SgXNUrDgkT_U-EFZLfTsYRwP0zL_ZgDG_FiAjEdFMkajSwpdl7_E59FOkXZ1UETZNLJvJ-PHCOuTS3yaoiEr-64yprNwx90m75k5_Ilx91fPPNegFZErB_GBDQCHbrtPYe5JkJivpnK9jYhNHf7jS3ihAI3LG8iCEfPmTHe46kW0AU23Q7Jnatve3_e-_LowOzFbDDLbm0DN2STVe1plqFZkCZqvrixrKT0mbJWOmT_u-9W7ENIiA7xa66HXOgnEJxkg)**

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=zaQmRzx67RuMK4iNXdFOBzcBIBqjT-tOd1ZiReofXxp1_DAcf6TnzBin1L-6SgXNUrDgkT_U-EFZLfTsYRwP0zL_ZgDG_FiAjEdFMkajSwqZQERBC4F2TPjChC4TusltMsN6IEnMMbZ0tL1jNIPqKHIBkXDNDFnpZ8GhC41FR95Bv493Fm5aJswuuDiTFN2WnwlRgLlwJqrXvYFUySADIyi4On16CCZ6YmGEYmRqh2Po9_mOk19z4pisyW7B9r0jPPMGrH4aBBuj_KeK9TIbcpr4l7rCwJz2Pcu444ROKKVOvwiVJmuAlwTPPI6O9PxE)

Friend, standing up for our principles takes guts, but I’m not afraid to do it. I want to show them I’m a fighter – that I’m determined to stand up for what I believe, even when people threaten me. Will you **stand against them** with me? Show me that you’re on my side**[by chipping in $5, $15, or $25.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=zaQmRzx67RuMK4iNXdFOBwklZs2JlYPwF8mGP_V2Rk1I-MbUvlHk1E2lKgQkqbLkol0ofYRjMSbO9b4GLwPIx47aKzHZWQQkbLzJ7IWcFYB_LszRwm18iNIcgzbi-CUh0f0FbOL7SRAvD5Jsw-teoPu_pXj5nYPcXW3cC1xNhETPMobUv9JL_0NkzhtbzIE51bHyEYaKY1fKdU0OduhV-12dtPHIY4hdH2PXBIX63NhqL5DlMd2zbpqYlgqiSmm8d0s8jvFnYJA7NYCvv3l93d37dkzc6bg8DO7Cae3G32D0AxDRyOyzKIerc0dcuYahEQw3MsctBYCLtZ7c5H1Hyxew7qLr-3hWTxnoHYXFumT6P7aj7RYhWUkqcuU9hhAUfJYlz9VyAtT8iTkHWFvVLjalhaiQXcmtf8p0VDx-Kc0%3D) **

They’ve seen the conservative reforms I’ve championed alongside Governor Walker like collective bargaining reform, billions in tax cuts and defunding Planned Parenthood.

Now they want to make sure I can’t do the same in Washington with President Trump.

We need to act quickly. The sooner you join me, the clearer our message is: We won’t be intimidated.
[STAND WITH LEAH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=zaQmRzx67RuMK4iNXdFOBwklZs2JlYPwF8mGP_V2Rk1I-MbUvlHk1E2lKgQkqbLkol0ofYRjMSbO9b4GLwPIx47aKzHZWQQkbLzJ7IWcFYB_LszRwm18iNIcgzbi-CUh0f0FbOL7SRAvD5Jsw-teoPu_pXj5nYPcXW3cC1xNhETPMobUv9JL_0NkzhtbzIE5TfzbmKRKC0I_HiLBzM4de5RZjHGhTWoqtAArDgHgMpj2cP4062Uw5IgaG5_mGym0Lx6RLvXlYJfOAlTgyz3GiEyRsCyElOdETaCHuTBrwrDWTqRccKeUolO3A3BogyjwFqNFOnyo9uwox6VENuOjCc2of1aUtiFYmI7amQL9AUGsAF8JkweG9TDjIJFoOF2B1dsFqCScyEuFj9gWYGlkK78GaAUP7NPbtK1_M6XRYWw%3D)

Leah

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=zaQmRzx67RuMK4iNXdFOB0B2zes66jpzEFe53XywHAQ38wsZe9KaKOa2ohX6DDps1v5ITr_ppBfHikrrm3CzLdQN09Uv2TEEL_T8-DJJsZ-Vl1nKFdkwMlxXFxQpcz8_jaXOUv13F35rdxSMg0sEIKv5W5ADG-speuxrW6H_pTO4CJ2DJI-vot1reOx61eE6VoZe7KvO_iVvN8q--xbjwf1HpAI2p1eDClej9Si4zP7xYnPI02wW95K4RrwpbZiz5P6X_m2AwypcRWNDPeNW_tlzwXNPddSN3LQ58lrdoRAbgkmmxbn-qlzZJtlNV9hQOywyJhUKCF58XA_JUsKQN3jZG7TnMRfrDTrGH6WQn2nTVa6PK2J8EyllH6Wd4qAo) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=zaQmRzx67RuMK4iNXdFOB0B2zes66jpzEFe53XywHARThg3QAsjn_44Pledp8vJfkJASmAcszndRJW8h5k6ljBghGBAmISYiA8EafEiBwAH6RGPuLITZzrpVo2Y0o5aYKY9hKpn2NqaOLMtzECvuy9oJzQpYMB-gBPX-GiSbYY1V7lVx1irzhvN8f_LDS-43dfIy1nU8arbD0nB7s-3aUTXyRNP9qhf7jEFYlXtRcuCv5pAiFDOMAho3k-QkXHIWWUt9VVLx1QmFYGC5VAwYIosmpVES_O1CCEjTbq0xbccQsKpThUzi-Lxhz-69FGBku_YIT2TqrmN4PXuqXu-6Ka_O9v5VIYQvY3ZHfKWiHsZZjVzqBRNOiVFMb3QbcvNM) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=zaQmRzx67RuMK4iNXdFOB_3nw7gHvBcw7tCIorkMEu7SsLT_TkoeqyEEDeq4FltWCgOWlNm-zfywzgFa8VgxSM8oP5TpQNR1D2T-WTuAOt_v1_A6czcBk5YuFAD0JRz3IEMCWKGfJ-iHYcjatDwjE_aVShpeGTMSn-HEw-bGEcImB3CMZUn1FC36bghhLBT2EMy5NVRVt9ERUYK18jGgXV3CPLTb5f3dAld8iK1RT_dBP7DPPQ6VNRb7vB41ZzhZ34eS7tkHee1sK8ce_CsvRg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=zaQmRzx67RuMK4iNXdFOB93jUV5wjZdN5O2tlw2ZAIDKrw8U7OtTu4nNulsRcEFvRs9jqBJpC6GYw0dS-YLn2-Ujl5MsURfQGGmb2V_dv33T8PPwvgpqXrHND811uq0BmcGHti_oPEpZDMhmPmSnlhabz8vGZNmTVOlt1DXF6e5rK1Eu-41TZEy2OH5BN_zJEK4MXFWQo_dH6XX1J8d2TOCk2edG5BiXYHJ1o6rsjykdiVqTGbKiYB36izCi0gmdSq3Ep67MuBModxU_WuBFgg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=zaQmRzx67RuMK4iNXdFOB5roCF_hwQG1ii5jziA83fqgMDDTuaidBJTMrB6bxcmbe5oiV7Qu6I_Qu2JFG8IaZ6FsJyL7YH7chrEywnP6Ddng23mKRAd4qn4wPRdz1WoYuR85bEbAp02YFSqHJtKT5vbERQy3Ro0mmL4gG45Gjdf9iGtGEi9Xed52EhrbFHK3tfaHHXren_i6UxA4H3xC73ADh9Clw939atMfgiUf2vWI0XRUEElZlsLpyB3Hq7faFmdVOqRBFYOXv5-7YCwMjQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=zaQmRzx67RuMK4iNXdFOB0B2zes66jpzEFe53XywHATsJ6yJpBLJRR8REZUqiYy6j9orhyy3F0IOdZo1EWsM9dxNt_EGKoEBFdkVebLknSYEl-y254zOmLB1kPibIGoaS59cW9eu5ORHcDJPlkYvEoiaxQ68QGX9YyJE07gDUPv4qMQTqegHCPDWiSw_GMlvpX_HfOD0LOAUfGtBAGYOoWzv3HrxhqInI8Ql2QomjUrK1VTDK6HOWV12qHd-U8cljCMP7IAmGgcSE4k4_t1imvFHRbpCV5SEpqRvjL7QYOgOoHMHmIPhVFcI5x9wBUGDgRhxxo8bv-1UI1itrWSh0ObRRsuO1Q0PSucHfn_Fy5m9odpDv036tKwYoOCjD3sjmFkXBqfLdJy9DizwQk5l7Q%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=1pqVgQ-XVhkgeN_WDTzRft8oECUxvPcmnr9EZOoYap5QV2eJHo4QaJGhckMvt4M6gdpw_mli_f9mWdmWAQABuP3DcybFjMOtggbWu9M9y5NK7gQH6a6Ra4tbu1okYaeGkWafN_W92hNxlOpZFfBijvS4RaYCzY5wigWeAkZMPBYJHOgYiMhQ9EV5GqMOjJV-LDtoQcu4keqkkan0-tsFunG7-fjcU1X3neBWHV-9KdGwOK_9UkE0WGdmUKAirRzU) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fded8028aadb498589368b770bf6888c&_e=1pqVgQ-XVhkgeN_WDTzRft8oECUxvPcmnr9EZOoYap5QV2eJHo4QaJGhckMvt4M6gdpw_mli_f9mWdmWAQABuP3DcybFjMOtggbWu9M9y5NK7gQH6a6Ra4tbu1okYaeGkWafN_W92hNxlOpZFfBijvS4RaYCzY5wigWeAkZMPBYJHOgYiMhQ9EV5GqMOjJV-LDtoQcu4keqkkan0-tsFunG7-fjcU1X3neBWHV-9KdGwOK_9UkE0WGdmUKAirRzU) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: The left is unhinged. When Scott Walker and I took bold action to turn Wisconsin around, they came after us with everything they had. They even thre Friend - The left is unhinged. When Scott Walker and I took bold action to turn Wisconsin around, they came after us with everything they had. They even threatened my life and the lives of my children. But I’m standing up to them – I decided to tell the story Friend, standing up for our principles takes guts, but I’m not afraid to do it. I want to show them I’m a fighter – that I’m determined to stand up for what I believe, even when people threaten me. Will you stand against them with me? Show me that you’re on my side They’ve seen the conservative reforms I’ve championed alongside Governor Walker like collective bargaining reform, billions in tax cuts and defunding Planned Parenthood. Now they want to make sure I can’t do the same in Washington with President Trump. We need to act quickly. The sooner you join me, the clearer our message is: We won’t be intimidated. I want to make sure every conservative Wisconsinite can stand up proudly for what they believe in. Together, we can brush off the threats and show them we mean business. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Heather Coil, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Campaign update: New endorsement, media, momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, We had another great week! We received another big endorsement (which I think will upset Josh Hawley) and scored lots of local media hits. News is spreading about our campaign and our campaign’s support growing FAST. Thank you so much for all of your support. We could not do this without you. **Rep. Mark Matthiesen endorses Austin Petersen:** We received our second major endorsement from a sitting Missouri state legislator last week! Rep. Mark Matthiessen (District 70) gave our campaign an incredible endorsement. You can read his statement here: [](https://www.austinpetersen.com/endorse?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061818_update&n=1) Mark Matthiessen’s endorsement is a big deal. This is the second endorsement we’ve received from a Missouri State Representative. The establishment does NOT want this. They are trying to keep people silent so they can keep their golden boy (Josh Hawley) happy. But our support continues to grow and the momentum is on our side. You can listen to Austin talk about the endorsement on the [**Mark Cox show here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fomny.fm%2Fshows%2Fthe-marc-cox-show-podcast%2Faustin-petersen-endorsed-by-rep-mark-matthiesen&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061818_update&n=2) **“A Genuine & Policy Focused Libertarian Republican is Shaking Up The Senate Race In Missouri & Might Just Win”:** The Conservatarian wrote an excellent piece about Austin Petersen’s campaign for Senate this week. This is a great article on the state of the race. Austin is a real champion of liberty that is running and it is major opportunity for the movement. [**You can read it here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftheconservatarianusa.com%2Faustin-petersen-shaking-up-the-senate-race-in-missouri%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061818_update&n=3) **Local media:** The campaign also had a TON of interviews last week. In fact, he had six interviews on Friday alone while we were in St.Louis. Austin is in demand! You can listen to his interview on the [**Annie Frey show here**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FAP4Liberty%2Fvideos%2F1844334358958869%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061818_update&n=4). He also appeared on the McGraw show which you can [**listen to here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FAP4Liberty%2Fvideos%2F1844113858980919%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061818_update&n=5) I encourage you to listen to at least one of them! Great way to catch up on events on the campaign trail. Thank you so much, Friend. Heather Coil
Communications Director
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

---
Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
([www.austinpetersen.com](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061818_update&n=6))

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

[Privacy Policy](http://www.austinpetersen.com/privacy?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061818_update&n=7) | [Unsubscribe](http://www.austinpetersen.com/unsubscribe?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061818_update&n=8)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: The Gag Rule
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | _HUGE: There 's only one federal grant program dedicated to family planning, and President Trump is trying to silence health care providers._

[**Tell Trump: Stop the attacks on family care!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b993/43d8135f/60a99aaa/5100aa1a/1649935658/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-stop-gag-rule%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_30DO_180618_1_1%26amount%3D5%26recurring%3Dtrue?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Tell+Trump+Stop+the+attacks+on+family+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1")

* * *

Here's what's happening,

Last month, the Trump administration announced a new rule that would ban Title X medical providers from discussing women's medical options or risk losing their funding.

**In New Mexico, we received over $3.3 million in Title X grants to support 67 care sites in 2017.** Putting this support at risk is bad news for New Mexicans and the millions of Americans that rely on Title X providers to receive comprehensive family planning and preventive health care services.

I'm working with Democrats and organizations nationwide to put a stop to President Trump's proposed 'gag rule', but we need to show that Americans are paying attention to these latest health care attacks.

[**To help raise awareness and put pressure on President Trump, I 've set a goal for 10,000 petition signers in the next 48 hours. Please, can you be one of the 10,000 we need to show President Trump that Americans stand against his Title X attacks?**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b993/43d8135f/60a99aaa/5100aa1d/1649935658/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-stop-gag-rule%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_30DO_180618_1_1%26amount%3D5%26recurring%3Dtrue?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+To+help+raise+awareness+and+put+pressure&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1")

[STAND AGAINST TRUMP >>](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b993/43d8135f/60a99aaa/5100aa1c/1649935658/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-stop-gag-rule%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_30DO_180618_1_1%26amount%3D5%26recurring%3Dtrue?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+STAND+AGAINST+TRUMP+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1")
Tens of thousands of New Mexicans depend on Title X services every year, but the Trump administration's latest proposal would put their care at risk. If this rule goes into effect, it will be much harder for individuals and families to get the care they need.

**Limiting what Title X providers can discuss with patients will lead to worse health care outcomes, plain and simple. That is why I am organizing to stop this rule, and I need your help.**

[**Be one of the 10,000 signers we need to send the message to Trump: We want you to stop the Title X gag rule!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b993/43d8135f/60a99aaa/5100aa1f/1649935658/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-stop-gag-rule%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_30DO_180618_1_1%26amount%3D5%26recurring%3Dtrue?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Be+one+of+the+10000+signers+we+need+to+s&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180618_1_1")

I appreciate your action to raise awareness for this latest attack on health care. We must remain vigilant in the face of decisions like this.

Thank you,
Martin

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Can you call Congress now? For the kids.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Our Revolution volunteers from Travis County, El Paso, and central Texas have organized, rallied, and marched on the tent city in Tornillo
#
Friends,
The violence exerted upon immigrant children and families has been happening for years, but Our Revolution members across Texas are taking action to end it.
Our Revolution volunteers from Travis County, El Paso, and central Texas have organized, rallied, and marched on the tent city in Tornillo to protest the Trump administration's cruel policy of separating families at the southern border. What your member of Congress needs to hear now is that we won't allow this to continue.
**Call on Congress to end the Trump administration's heartless "zero-tolerance" policy, which separates families at the southern border leaving children without their parents.**
**[CALL CONGRESS»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa99/bed43eb/67411061/75fd0b33/2255414886/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/ice-accountability/?source=em180618-suba")**
As of today, no Republican senator has signed onto the legislation that would stop this country's policy of ripping breastfeeding children from the arms of their mothers, separating thousands of families at the border, and locking minors in cages. We have to hold them accountable and take action to put a stop to this cruel practice.
Members of Congress and their staff need to hear from you directly. We have to make them imagine these children as their own. Every one of our elected officials should be working just as hard as grassroots leaders are to push for the change necessary to protect the freedom of immigrant families.
[**Call your member of Congress and demand they put a stop to the "zero-tolerance" policy keeping children from their parents.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa99/bed43eb/67411061/75fd0b33/2255414886/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/ice-accountability/?source=em180618-suba")
Thank you for speaking out and standing by our immigrant communities against this cruel injustice.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[CALL CONGRESS»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa99/bed43eb/67411061/75fd0b33/2255414886/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/ice-accountability/?source=em180618-suba")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa99/bed43eb/67411061/75fd0b3c/2255414886/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa99/bed43eb/67411061/75fd0b3f/2255414886/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
