name: Dana Bye
subject: “Dave Brat is Done...”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

This race is winnable. We've known it from the beginning because of the incredible excitement we've seen here on the ground. But you don't have to take my word for it. This is what Shaun Kenney, a **former executive director of the Republican Party of Virginia** , had to say after our incredible primary win:
_**' Dave Brat is done by the numbers. By math, he's done,'** Kenney told Yahoo News. **' There should not be that much Democratic support for that candidate, and Spanberger blew it out of the water,' **Kenney said._
It will not be easy to beat our House Freedom Caucus incumbent, and as the Republican party continues to recognize how vulnerable he is, we should expect them to fight tooth-and-nail to keep this seat. But the extraordinary primary results are a telling indicator that the people of this District are ready to make a change, and a generous, early donation from you is what we need to make the most of the advantage we've built.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZgYqCDxJxccvAEkypwShljzdiqxWvw_y0g0gYF_uMLw=/Z56JvxnK-tsjmWVKVfUmEvbvwwybyn4JuqgSbZz2jHA=?refcode=061818)
With just 5 short months until the election, we need to move fast to recharge our campaign. [Donate to Team Spanberger today](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZgYqCDxJxccvAEkypwShljzdiqxWvw_y0g0gYF_uMLw=/Z56JvxnK-tsjmWVKVfUmEvbvwwybyn4JuqgSbZz2jHA=?refcode=061818), and together we can do exactly what the Republicans and Democrats both know is possible -- win!

Thank you,

\- Dana Bye
_Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZgYqCDxJxccvAEkypwShljzdiqxWvw_y0g0gYF_uMLw=/qU3KkG1Ld5dvH59jMh8AnUmQIZCagAWy8xZuJiF9M44=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZgYqCDxJxccvAEkypwShljzdiqxWvw_y0g0gYF_uMLw=/r5IJqwnM8sTHZX2k0j1wg4u5SK_koMQZzWjDzzJIXvU=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILY's List
subject: This kind of opportunity doesn't come very often
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47c8/24c69fd9/19f0a8d80/1880eb25/1822964821/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER41N_digital_email_20180618_Ellen_inact&source=WQEFER41N_digital_email_20180618_Ellen_inact")
---

Peter,

They're already calling 2018 "the next Year of the Woman."

And just like the first "Year of the Woman" in 1992, I'm so proud that EMILY's List is at the forefront of this sea change.

After more than a year of marching in the streets and raising a ruckus in Congress, citizens are now showing up in the voting booth for our candidates -- pro-choice Democratic women who will stop Republicans' rollback of decades' worth of progress.

But we aren't just fighting for one year of women.

This is an opportunity that comes around rarely in elections. And if we seize it, we could change the political landscape for an entire generation.

**[Donate $3 to make this the year, the decade-- heck, THE CENTURY of the woman.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47c8/24c69fd9/19f0a8d80/1880eb26/1822964821/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180618_email_Ellen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+make+this+the+year+the+decad&utm_campaign=WQEFER41N_digital_email_20180618_Ellen_inact&source=WQEFER41N_digital_email_20180618_Ellen_inact")**

There are plenty of similarities between now and what we saw in 1992 after Anita Hill's testimony fired women up to volunteer, vote, and run for office.

Once again, sexual misconduct and women's rights are at the forefront of the national conversation. But so are many other conversations -- about cruel immigration policies, attacks on Obamacare, trade policies that hurt working families, and so much more.

It's clear that millions of Americans are rejecting the Trump view of the world. But Republicans in Congress are embracing it.

So if we want things to change, we have to change the people in charge.

It won't be easy, but EMILY's List has never avoided the hard fights. In fact, we're pretty good at winning them when we all work together.

**Donate $3 to support our pro-choice Democratic women who will get this country moving forward again:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/More-Than-A-Year](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47c8/24c69fd9/19f0a8d80/1880eb27/1822964821/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180618_email_Ellen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgMoreThanAYear&utm_campaign=WQEFER41N_digital_email_20180618_Ellen_inact&source=WQEFER41N_digital_email_20180618_Ellen_inact")**

Warmest regards,

Ellen R. Malcolm
Founder and Chair of the Board, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47c8/24c69fd9/19f0a8d80/1880eb20/1822964821/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180618_email_Ellen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFER41N_digital_email_20180618_Ellen_inact&source=WQEFER41N_digital_email_20180618_Ellen_inact")

clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, They're already calling 2018 "the next Year of the Woman." And just like the first "Year of the Woman" in 1992, I'm so proud that EMILY's List is at the forefront of this sea change. After more than a year of marching in the streets and raising a ruckus in Congress, citizens are now showing up in the voting booth for our candidates -- pro-choice Democratic women who will stop Republicans' rollback of decades' worth of progress. But we aren't just fighting for one year of women. This is an opportunity that comes around rarely in elections. And if we seize it, we could change the political landscape for an entire generation. "" There are plenty of similarities between now and what we saw in 1992 after Anita Hill's testimony fired women up to volunteer, vote, and run for office. Once again, sexual misconduct and women's rights are at the forefront of the national conversation. But so are many other conversations -- about cruel immigration policies, attacks on Obamacare, trade policies that hurt working families, and so much more. It's clear that millions of Americans are rejecting the Trump view of the world. But Republicans in Congress are embracing it. So if we want things to change, we have to change the people in charge. It won't be easy, but EMILY's List has never avoided the hard fights. In fact, we're pretty good at winning them when we all work together. Donate $3 to support our pro-choice Democratic women who will get this country moving forward again: "" Warmest regards, Ellen R. name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: [Breaking] Ending the outrage at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

The Trump Administration should never have allowed children to be forcibly separated from their parents at our border. **What 's happening right now is a tragedy and an outrage.**

Since the Administration began enforcing its new policy, nearly 2,000 children have been separated from their parents. Children are being held in detention centers. The President chose to do this and he could end it today. **He won 't, so we must.**
[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=qSwwN6y78Sh3j3OFQl0fGjAMYe8%2BFxXa)
---
Just hours ago we announced that each and every one of the 49 Senate Democrats supports our bill to end forced family separation. I am an original co-sponsor of The Keep Families Together Act and we're going to keep up the pressure until we make this right.

**We can 't allow this cruelty to continue. This isn't who we are. Congress must lead so that we fix this -- now.**

This shouldn't be happening in our country and it must stop.

\-- Amy

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=EWPgRWy8lqijBbP4byblkzAMYe8%2BFxXa)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: IMPORTANT: Early voting has started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
In the Democratic primary, there are a number of good candidates for Governor, but reliable polls show that two candidates are well-ahead of the others and are locked in a virtual dead heat. | __
In the Democratic primary, there are a number of good candidates for Governor, but reliable polls show that two candidates are well-ahead of the others and are locked in a virtual dead heat. Early voting has already started and every vote will matter.

I am writing to encourage you to support Rushern Baker for Governor and I want to tell you why. I've known Rushern Baker for over 25 years - when as young state legislators we teamed up to work on a number of important issues including strengthening Maryland's schools and education system. But I am not supporting Rushern because I have known him a long time; I am supporting him because I have seen him in action and he will make a superb Governor. He has always been willing to confront powerful special interests to advance the public good and he is not afraid to stand up against the tide and do the right thing. Rushern knows our state well and is a tested executive who has demonstrated his ability to make tough decisions and govern. As Prince George's County Executive since 2010, he has proven to be a highly effective and reform-minded leader.

At the time he was elected County Executive, Prince George's County was in the throes of a political corruption scandal that threatened its future. Rushern moved quickly to implement sweeping ethics reforms to make County government more open and accountable. He also took immediate steps to address rising violence and crime, and made improving public education a key priority. The results of his leadership are evident today. The County is now number one in Maryland in job creation and rising home values, and a regional leader in economic development. Crime has dropped to the lowest levels in 30 years and the County now has some of the toughest ethics laws in the state. Public school enrollment has climbed, full-day prekindergarten and language immersion programs have expanded and County-wide test scores are up. In short, Rushern Baker has a strong record of results.

Rushern also made a superb decision in his choice for a running mate to be Lt. Governor. Elizabeth Embry is a thoughtful, talented leader in her own right with an extraordinary track record of accomplishments and a deep knowledge of Baltimore. Chief of the Criminal Division in the office of the Maryland Attorney General and a former attorney in the Baltimore state's attorney office, Embry will be a major asset to our state as Lt. Governor.

Maryland would be in strong, experienced and effective hands with Rushern Baker and Elizabeth Embry at the helm. They know Maryland, they know the issues, and, if elected, they will hit the ground running. **_[To learn more or volunteer visit www.rushernbaker.com.](www.rushernbaker.com)_**

Early voting has already started and Election Day is Tuesday, June 26th.
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord Street, Suite 202
Kensington, MD 20895

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: What I saw this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We have a corruption emergency that we must address head on.
#
Peter -
Another corruption trial started in New York today.
I went to opening arguments of the "Buffalo Billion" trial in the Southern District of New York this morning, where the prosecutor laid out a scandalous scheme of powerful insiders ripping off the public.
Talk about a rigged system.
We have a corruption emergency that we must address head on. This case shows just how deep the rot goes, from big New York campaign donors to the highest paid state employee.
Cases like this show why we need a strong, independent, tenacious Attorney General, unafraid of power.
We've had over a year of ongoing corruption trials in New York, and there's more to come this summer and fall.
But most politicians keep quiet, so as not to offend the powers that be. In 2014, I spoke out about the corruption potential in the Buffalo Billion -- noting the relationship between political donors and developers specifically. In fact, I named the defendants and asked out loud whether the contracts were fair. I wish I had not been right, but this is the disheartening reality of our politics.
Our corruption crisis is enabled by this culture of silence, where the powerful protect and reward each other. This is not about bad apples; it's a systemic issue. Anyone who says otherwise is either willfully or naively ignorant of the depth of the problem -- or complicit in it.
As Attorney General, I will be relentless in rooting out corruption in government wherever it may exist. But I cannot do it alone, so I have to ask:
**[Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign right now as a way of saying you want our next Attorney General to aggressively fight corruption? The political and financial establishment want to stop this from happening, but together we will win.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e76/6e822e2f/1b421211/41726896/3317512210/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTgtZSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-buffalo-billion?refcode=em180618-e")**
For far too long in New York, public officials, Wall Street and real estate have been too cozy. The corruption that comes with these back-room deals -- legal and illegal -- hurts our communities and damages the public's trust in government.
That's why there's never been a more important time to elect an Attorney General who is unquestionably independent. This moment requires an AG who will be unafraid to challenge the corrupt elites rigging our system and take on Albany's old boys' club.
This election is our chance to return political and economic power to the people, to make sure that justice is finally served. But the only way to do that is with all of us. Together.
**[Please chip in $3 today to help us fund our grassroots campaign. If you're with us on this, we will win this fight and close the door on this gross history of corruption.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e76/6e822e2f/1b421211/41726896/3317512210/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTgtZSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-buffalo-billion?refcode=em180618-e")**
Thanks,
Zephyr Teachout
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e76/6e822e2f/1b421211/41726896/3317512210/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTgtZSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-buffalo-billion?refcode=em180618-e")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---

Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e76/6e822e2f/1b421211/41726897/3317512210/VEsC/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Banks?=
subject: See what Team Banks has been up to!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends, It was another busy weekend for Team Banks!

On Thursday we had a great time at the Allen County GOP precinct committee meeting. We want to send a big thanks to Steve Shine for his leadership as we move forward to victory in November! The rest of the weekend was spent going door to door, marching in the Hoagland and Turtle Days parades and meeting with voters at the Allen County Republican Breakfast. We even bought fireworks to support Allen County Right to Life, stood up for our 2nd Amendment rights at the Fort Wayne Second Amendment Rally and tasted some great ribs at the 21st Annual Rib Fest!

We are so thankful for our team of grassroots supporters who have been hitting the pavement to help us spread our conservative message. [Will you chip in $10 today to help sponsor our volunteer efforts?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=327a79564e&e=bfe3be83a5) We look forward to seeing you on the trail soon!

Team Banks

name: Team Ryan
subject: Vice President Pence greeted in Ohio by massive dance party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Vice President Mike Pence and other D.C. Republicans are panicking that they will lose ANOTHER special election -- this time in Ohio's TOSS-UP 12th District. | |
---
Folks, **Vice President Mike Pence and other D.C. Republicans are panicking that they will lose ANOTHER special election -- this time in Ohio's TOSS-UP 12th District.** Pence was in Columbus, Ohio on Friday to raise big money to defeat our endorsed candidate, Democrat Danny O'Connor. According to the _Plain-Dealer, _his speech was interrupted multiple times by protesters. **Then, outside the venue, Pence was greeted by another group of protesters -- a massive LGBTQ dance party!** We've got to make sure every voter in OH-12 "dances" to the polls to elect Democrat Danny O'Connor on August 7. [So far, we've received 274 donations to elect Danny and take back the House -- can we make it 500 grassroots donations (of any amount) by the end of the week?](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fb/5486deaa/280f3529/dcc7e06/1297807486/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_dannyoconnor?refcode=em20180618_pence_30&amount=12")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: The Keep Families Together Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Like many of you, I am extremely alarmed about the situation at our southern border. The Administration's new policy of separating migrant children from their families is wrong and inconsistent with o |
---

| | Peter,

Like many of you, I am extremely alarmed about the situation at our southern border. The Administration's new policy of separating migrant children from their families is wrong and inconsistent with our values as Americans.

It's no secret that our country's immigration system has been broken for a long time. I have long supported a bipartisan approach to fixing it, and I'm still hopeful that we can work together to get it done.

**But the separation of young children from their parents at the border requires immediate action. That 's why I cosponsored S. 3036, the Keep Families Together Act.**

I hope you will join me in continuing to voice your opposition to the cruel policy of family separation as we work toward a solution. This issue is too important to stay silent about.

Thanks,
Joe |
---|---|---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206

# **Caging children is _NOT_ who we are.**
Friends:

Over the past few days, I've watched the heartbreaking scenes of children separated from their families knowing my opponent supports the hard line stance on immigration purported by this administration.

When I am elected to Congress, I will fight for bipartisan immigration policies that are fair, firm, and humane - because I know that we can achieve a pathway to citizenship without caging children and separating families.

Please watch the video message on this issue below, and then chip in $10 today to stand with me by clicking [HERE.](https://haydenforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00c7d4e4fc0f592a26f7d559b&id=696c754ac9&e=fa4530268f)

Hayden

Governor Wolf is the only incumbent Democratic governor in a state that went for President Trump in 2016.

Now, Trump and Vice President Pence are trying to shore up their faltering base by defeating Governor Wolf and replacing him with a failed state senator whose destructive rhetoric and harmful policies match theirs to a tee.

Their corporate and special interest backers are more than ready to spend a fortune to make it happen. So we're building a grassroots army of supporters and donors who can take them head on. But we need your help to do it.

**[Let's show Pence that grassroots energy can overcome whatever he can raise for Scott Wagner. Chip in $5 or more now to Governor Wolf's Democratic campaign:](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-pence-in-pa?gpsid=14_50_1341&refcode=em18_180618_pencpa_fnd_gq_act_1_bm_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180618_pencpa_fnd_gq_act_1_bm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=13+-+Letrsquos+show+Pence+that+grassroots+ene")**

**[https://secure.WolfForPA.com/Pence-in-PA](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-pence-in-pa?gpsid=14_50_1341&refcode=em18_180618_pencpa_fnd_gq_act_1_bm_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180618_pencpa_fnd_gq_act_1_bm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=14+-+httpssecureWolfForPAcomPenceinPA")**

Beth Melena

body:

I really need your help, friends: **With just a few hours before our midnight deadline, we are still 283 Founding Members short of what we need to win this race and turn New Hampshire blue. **
I'm not accepting any money from the corporations that are bankrolling Governor Sununu, so grassroots donors like you are _critical_ to our campaign.

We need to stop the Trump-Sununu agenda that prioritizes wealthy corporations and special interests ahead of children and families. **That's why I need you to become a Founding Member of this campaign before midnight to help me take back the corner office for Democrats this November.**

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Some good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Friend,
There is a lot of heartbreak in the news lately. I know it can be challenging to stay motivated and keep pushing forward, so I wanted to share some good news with you!
I just signed a new bill into law that will protect Rhode Island Dreamers' ability to obtain driver's licenses, regardless of what happens to the DACA program at the federal level.
Rhode Island is a better place with Dreamers in it. These young people have called Rhode Island home since they were children or even infants. Dreamers are our friends and neighbors, they are contributing members of our society and they deserve to be treated as such.
When President Trump first threatened to end DACA, we came together and raised funds to cover Rhode Island Dreamers' renewal fees. Today's action is the next step in our fight to protect Rhode Island Dreamers from Trump's harmful policies.
No matter what happens in Washington, D.C, I will always stand up for Rhode Islanders.
**[Will you stand up with me?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0c3/5e076a9e/542e876e/14426131/117822313/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gmr-daca")**
Gina

\-------
###### Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.
###### Friends of Gina Raimondo
PO Box 40794
Providence, RI 02940
###### This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
###### If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, visit [https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0c3/5e076a9e/542e876e/14426130/117822313/VEsE/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe").
